name: Sentinel
description: Enterprise-grade B2B SaaS Windows laptop hardware diagnostic monitor with deterministic server-side scoring, custom PowerShell/Python collection scripts, and a C# tray background agent, storing rich telemetry in PostgreSQL.
conventions: Core scoring formulas must remain 100% deterministic (in @workspace/report-engine)
API routes must use Express router mounted in artifacts/api-server/src/routes/
Diagnostic reports generate on the server-side only for security
All sensor metrics from native tools must match unified sentinelSchema:1
architecture_patterns: Monorepo with decoupled frontend applications, shared libs, and native C# apps
Server-side deterministic scoring engine with versioned formula execution
Layered native collector fallbacks (WMI -> Performance Counters -> IOCTL)
Passwordless magic-link authentication with session cookies

file_structure.artifacts/api-server: Express API server handling auth, scoring, and pair flow
file_structure.artifacts/sentinel-site: Main Vite/Tailwind marketing and interactive diagnostic flow
file_structure.artifacts/novasentinel: Enterprise Fleet Dashboard with 4s real-time telemetry polling
file_structure.lib/db: Shared database workspace utilizing Drizzle ORM and Postgres connection
file_structure.lib/report-engine: Shared schema validation and deterministic scoring engine
file_structure.native/SentinelAgent: Tier 1 C# Windows Service, tray application, and WiX installer
file_structure.native/SentinelOneShot: Tier 2 standalone C# diagnostic scanner executable

patterns: Rigorous unit testing for all formula weight and threshold variations
API request validation testing via Supertest or Vitest mock routes
Diagnostic schema compliance testing for JSON payloads

sprint_focus: Fleet Dashboard real-time telemetry polling, parsing C# agent reports, and comprehensive README documentation.
never_do: Never use Math.random or other non-deterministic logic for scoring calculations
Never store plain text passwords or secrets in the codebase
Never bypass Zod validation schema for ingested client reports
Never trust client-side score evaluations; always compute on the API server
preferred_patterns: Use Zod for input validation across the monorepo boundary
Use Drizzle ORM for PostgreSQL queries and schema migrations
Use wouter for routing in frontend projects
Use Framer Motion for responsive premium UI transitions
